'''tadhïfyïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zemindarship|zemindarship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zemindarship|zemindarship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| tadhïfyïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || tædhïfyïfth || tædhïfyïfj || tædhïfyïfsh || tædhïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || tadhïfdhïfyïfth || tadhïfdhïfyïfj || tadhïfdhïfyïfsh || tadhïfdhïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || tadhïfyïfth || tadhïfyïfj || tadhïfyïfsh || tadhïfyïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || tadhïffyïffth || tadhïffyïffj || tadhïffyïffsh || tadhïffyïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tadhïfyïfïf || tadhïfyïfïf || tadhïfyïfïf || tadhïfyïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || tadhïfyïfth || tadhïfyïfj || tadhïfyïfsh || tadhïfyïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tadhïfyïfïfl || tadhïfyïfïfl || tadhïfyïfïfl || tadhïfyïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tadhïfyïfïfïf || tadhïfyïfïfïf || tadhïfyïfïfïf || tadhïfyïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || tadhïfyïfïfn || tadhïfyïfïfn || tadhïfyïfïfn || tadhïfyïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tadhïfyïfïforo || tadhïfyïfïforo || tadhïfyïfïforo || tadhïfyïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d34c0b6}}
